last_completed_round.direction_name: Retune the tensor tile so each warp does more MMA work per shared-memory feed
last_completed_round.hypothesis: The 32x32 CTA uses only 2 warps and each warp consumes 1 A fragment plus 2 B fragments for just 2 MMA ops per K-slice. After the 16-byte async-copy change, global delivery improved, but the kernel is still dominated by shared-memory issue pressure (`smsp__warp_issue_stalled_mio_throttle_per_warp_active.pct = 42.83`) and weak residency (`sm__warps_active.avg.pct_of_peak_sustained_active = 45.70`). A tile retune that increases math per warp, starting with a wider N footprint and only then adding more warps if registers stay reasonable, should convert the faster staging path into higher tensor utilization.

notes: Completed round 2/20. Continue with node_b for round 3/20. Accepted base: 20260418_222639_bf16_gemm_v1_95056ed at 66.354687 ms.
